title: Forging a Trident│鍛造一把三叉戟
description: Tridents can be crafted and repaired using Nautilus Shells.│三叉戟可以合成以及透過鸚鵡螺殼來修補。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
1. You can craft a trident.│你可以合成三叉戟。
2. You can use the Nautilus Shell to repair 25% of the Trident's durability.(This feature requires [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) to be installed in order to function.)│你可以透過鸚鵡螺殼來修復三叉戟25%的耐久度。‎（這個功能需要安裝 [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) 才能運作）

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
